title: Catch Us at These Events
content: Exciting news! The Bitcoin Dev Project will be at the upcoming Oslo Freedom Forum. On Monday June 1 at 3:30pm, our very own Satsie will team up with Mo from the Bitcoin Design Foundation for a workshop titled “Making Freedom Tech Beautiful”. Stop by for a live vibe design session with actual bitcoin app screens. Learn to borrow the best from top apps and watch as UX hierarchy principles are applied on the spot. Walk away with a Claude skill file so you can keep vibe designing long after the workshop ends. We’d love to see you there!
